title: NHDTA-532 It was an office lady who was given a sleeping pill and escaped half-naked while fighting against sleepiness ... but a regrettable ●
overview: A man who calls an office lady to the factory where he works by making a complaint call. The man makes the office lady who came to drink tea with sleeping pills. And if you continue to apologize, the sleeping pill begins to work and blames the empty office lady. An office lady who wakes up when she is playing with her body and runs away while hiding half-naked. However, when she catches an office lady who has lost her sleep and has fallen into a state of sickness, she takes off her clothes and tastes her body, and throws Ji-Po into a non-resisting Mako.
